name: SanDisk ImageMate PRO USB-C Multi-Card Reader/Writer
description: Transfer data from SD, microSD, and CompactFlash cards to your computer using the ImageMate PRO USB-C Multi-Card Reader/Writer from SanDisk,

features.Key Features: 1 x SDXC Slot (UHS-II) | 1 x microSDXC Slot (UHS-II) | 1 x CompactFlash Slot (UDMA 7) | SD/microSD Speeds up to 312 MB/s | CompactFlash Speeds up to 160 MB/s | Micro-USB 3.0 Interface | USB 2.0 Compatible | Plug-and-Play | Includes micro-USB to USB-C Cable | Windows and Mac Compatible
features.What’s In The Box: SanDisk ImageMate PRO USB-C Multi-Card Reader/Writer | Micro-USB to USB-C Cable
